allowed_claims: Stage6 has replicated AAN consumer intake, manifest check, task-root mount, no-local-repair verification, and runtime-adapter preflight on one articulated asset and one rigid transparent prop.
The replicated AAN packages now have per-asset GenManip task lanes, lane-local assets_manifest.json files, and wrapper USD scenes that point at their own mounted AAN packages.
Stage4a preflight is PASS for MuffleFurnace and Beaker_01; Stage4b live smoke has not been run yet.

meaning: Two non-DryingBox AAN packages pass consumer intake, manifest check, task-root mount dry-run, no-local-repair verification, and AAN runtime-adapter preflight. Stage4b live smoke is the next unrun gate; semantic evaluator execution remains a separate follow-up.
notes: The earlier 20260701_0950 summary is superseded for Stage4a status: generic AAN task lane / manifest routing has now been implemented and preflighted.

Generic smoke lanes intentionally set generation_config.goal=[] and object_config={} and use the neutral instruction 'Run AAN package reset/step smoke.' to avoid leaking the DryingBox contract into replicated assets.
No ConvertAsset package files were edited; no-local-repair verify records remain PASS for both assets.
Stage4a records set aan_runtime_adapter_preflight_passed=true and aan_live_eval_smoke_passed=false.
